info.name: Gear Up
info.description:
# 🚀 GearUp Rental API

GearUp is a Sports & Outdoor Equipment Rental Platform.

This API allows customers to rent equipment, providers to manage inventory, and administrators to oversee the platform.

## 🔒 Authentication

Authentication uses JWT Bearer Token.

After logging in, copy the access token and set

Authorization  
Bearer Token

{{accessToken}}

## Base URL

#### Development

[http://localhost:4](http://localhost:4000)[000](http://localhost:4000)

#### Production

[https://gearup-rental-api.vercel.app](https://your-domain.vercel.app/api)

## 👤 Allowed Roles

Admin

Provider

Customer

## Response Format

## 📤 Success Format

{  
"success": true,  
"statusCode": 200,  
"message": "Success message",  
"data": {}  
}

## ❌ Error Format

{  
"success": false,  
"message": "Something went wrong",  
"errorDetails": {}  
}

## 📝 Status Flow

One section should explain the complete rental lifecycle.

PLACED  
│  
▼  
CONFIRMED  
│  
▼  
PAID  
│  
▼  
PICKED_UP  
│  
▼  
RETURNED

PLACED ─────────► CANCELLED

CONFIRMED ──────► CANCELLED

## 📝 Payment Flow

Customer  
│  
▼  
Create Rental  
│  
▼  
Rental Order Created  
│  
▼  
SSLCommerz Session  
│  
▼  
paymentUrl Returned  
│  
▼  
Customer Pays  
│  
▼  
SSLCommerz Callback  
│  
▼  
Validate Transaction  
│  
▼  
Payment → PAID  
│  
▼  
Rental → PAID

## ❌ Error Codes

| Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| 400 | Bad Request |
| 401 | Unauthorized |
| 403 | Forbidden |
| 404 | Resource Not Found |
| 409 | Conflict |
| 500 | Internal Server Error |
| 502 | Payment Gateway Error |

item.description:
## 📖 Description

Category management endpoints.

Categories are used to organize rental equipment into logical groups such as Camping, Cycling, Hiking, Fishing, etc.

## 📌 Endpoints (CRUD Operations)

• Create Category  
• Get Categories  
• Update Category  
• Delete Category

## 🔒 Authentication

#### GET:

Public

#### POST, PATCH, DELETE:

Admin Only

response.name: Get Gear By Id

item.description:
# 📖 Description

Gear endpoints provide access to all rental equipment available on the platform.

Customers can browse equipment, view details, search, filter, and sort available gear.

## 📌 Endpoints

• Get All Gear  
• Get Gear Details

## 🔒 Authentication

Public

## 📝 Features

• Pagination  
• Search  
• Category Filtering  
• Price Filtering  
• Sorting

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Description         |
| --------- | ------------------- |
| searchTerm    | Search by gear name, brand or description |
| categoryId  | Filter category by id    |
| minPrice  | Minimum price per day      |
| maxPrice  | Maximum price per day       |
| page      | Pagination — page number         |
| limit     | Pagination — items per page         |

item.description:
## 📖 Description

Provider endpoints allow equipment providers to manage their rental inventory and rental requests.

Only authenticated providers can access these endpoints.

## 📌 Endpoints

• Create Gear  
• My Gear  
• Update Gear  
• Delete Gear  
• Rental Requests  
• Update Rental Status

## 🔒 Authentication

Bearer Token Required

## 👤 Allowed Roles

Provider Only

item.name: Rental Order

request.description:
## Access

Customer

## 📖 Description

Creates a rental order and immediately initializes ###SSLCommerz payment.

## 📥 Request Body

``` json
{  
"gearItemId":"uuid",  
"quantity":1,  
"startDate":"2026-07-13T00:00:00.000Z",  
"endDate":"2026-07-16T00:00:00.000Z"  
}

 ```

## 📤 Success Response

``` json
{  
"success":true,  
"message":"Rental Order created successfully",  
"data":{  
"rentalOrder":{
   },
    "paymentUrl":"https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/...",
    "tranId":"TRNX_ID_172123123"
 }
}

 ```

## 📝 Business Flow

Create Rental  
↓  
Stock Validation  
↓  
Rental Order Created  
↓  
Payment Session Created  
↓  
Return paymentUrl

item.description:
## 📖 Description

Rental endpoints manage the complete rental lifecycle.

Customers can create rentals, view their rental history, retrieve rental details, and cancel eligible rental orders.

## 📌 Endpoints

• Create Rental  
• Get Rentals  
• Get Rental Details  
• Cancel Rental

## 🔒 Authentication

Bearer Token Required

## 👤 Allowed Roles

Customer Only

## 📝 Rental Status

Pending  
Confirmed  
Active  
Completed  
Cancelled

request.description:

``` json
 }

 ```

## 📤 Success Response

``` json
{

    "tranId":"TRNX_ID_17231"
}

 ```

item.description:
## 📖 Description

Payment endpoints manage rental payment processing and transaction history.

Supported gateways include Stripe and SSLCommerz.

In our project we implemented the SSLCommerz payment method.

## 📌 Endpoints

• Initialize Payment  
• Confirm Payment  
• Payment History  
• Payment Details

## 🔒 Authentication

Bearer Token Required

## 👤 Allowed Roles

Customer Only

## 📝 Features

• Secure Payment Processing  
• Transaction History  
• Payment Status Tracking

## 📝 Confirm Payment

Called automatically by SSLCommerz after successful payment. That's why we do not need to call it from here.

Normally frontend never calls this endpoint manually.

#### Query

orderId

tranId

status

response.name: Create review

item.description:
## 📖 Description

Review endpoints allow customers to share their rental experience after completing a rental.

## 📌 Endpoints

• Create Review

## 🔒 Authentication

Bearer Token Required

## 👤 Allowed Roles

Customer Only

## 📝 Rules

• Reviews can only be submitted for completed rentals.  
• Each rental can only receive one review, means customer can review only once.
